title: How to solve the "Docker Desktop - WSL kernel version too low" error
body:
How can I solve the "Docker Desktop - WSL kernel version too low [Content]" error?

The rest of the error message:

Docker Desktop requires a newer WSL kernel version.

Update the WSL kernel by running "wsl --update" or follow instructions at https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/wsl/wsl2-kernel.

The solution is:

  • wsl --update

answers.body:
I have found this answer. I ran it in the cmd/PowerShell terminal, and it worked for me.

Type wsl --update in your terminal to solve the problem.
